title: Advanced Pod Configuration — Built-in PriorityClasses
text:
Kubernetes provides two built-in PriorityClasses:
system-cluster-critical
: For system components that are critical to the cluster
system-node-critical
: For system components that are critical to individual nodes. This is the highest priority that Pods can have in Kubernetes.
For more information, see
Pod Priority and Preemption
.
